Id1.text: Abilene is located in Texas in the United States. Washington, D. C. is the country's capital.

Id2.text: Abilene is part of Texas which is in the US, the capital of which is Washington DC.

Id3.text: Abilene is a part of Texas, in the United States, of which Washington, D.C. is the capital.
